name: Bacalao (Salt Cod)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the salt cod, changing the water three or four times.
2. Soak the cod overnight in water to cover.
3. Drain the fish thoroughly.
4. Cut the fish into 2-inch pieces.
5. Place the pieces in cold water to cover, bring to boil, and drain well.
6. Chop the onions and garlic.
7. Heat olive oil in a pan and fry the chopped onions and drained pimentos until tender.
8. Stir in the tomato sauce, parsley, and wine.
9. Cover and simmer over very low heat for 30 minutes.
10. Place the cod pieces into the sauce and simmer, uncovered, for 30 to 45 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily.
11. Serves 4.
